idea.title: Shit Truck
idea.hook: Drive a sanitation truck between overflowing bins, suck the sludge into the tank with a hold-to-vacuum nozzle, and dump at the plant before the tank ruptures.
idea.prototype: Top-down city map (single screen, 6 bin spawn points + 1 plant). Arrow keys drive truck. Hold mouse near a bin = vacuum stream particles into tank gauge. Tank capacity = primary resource; overfilling = trail of brown splats behind truck (rep loss). Each contract = clear N bins → bank at plant → upgrade suction radius / tank size. Lose at 3 reputation strikes.
idea.why_novel: Cleaning + driving combo unshipped in portfolio
idea.lose_condition: 3 reputation strikes from overflow splats OR tank ruptures from over-vacuuming

sources.title: Meme button post
sources.snippet: Russian channels keep validating absurd-cartoon themes
